title: Hydrosat Extension
description: Hydrosat STAC Extension for STAC Items.

oneOf.$comment: Schema defining the structure of Hydrosat STAC Items.

hydrosat:strip_id.title: Strip ID
hydrosat:strip_id.description: Unique identifier of the strip from which the scene was captured.

hydrosat:day_night.title: Day/Night Indicator
hydrosat:day_night.description: Indicates whether the scene is collected during the day or night.

hydrosat:radiometric_scaling.radiance_to.title: Radiance to Reflectance Scaling
hydrosat:radiometric_scaling.radiance_to.description: Scaling factor to convert radiance to reflectance for the asset band.

hydrosat:radiometric_scaling.reflectance.title: Reflectance to Radiance Scaling
hydrosat:radiometric_scaling.reflectance.description: Scaling factor to convert reflectance to radiance for the asset band.

hydrosat:brightness_temperature_coeffici.title: Brightness Temperature K1 Constant
hydrosat:brightness_temperature_coeffici.description: Thermal calibration K1 constant for converting radiance to brightness temperature.

hydrosat:brightness_temperature_coeffici.title: Brightness Temperature K2 Constant
hydrosat:brightness_temperature_coeffici.description: Thermal calibration K2 constant for converting radiance to brightness temperature.

^(?!hydrosat:).$comment: Permits additional properties not prefixed with 'hydrosat:' without validation.
